name: persona-distill
description: Persona Distillation Ecosystem — a parameterized schema library + generation/evaluation/scheduling/debate toolkit for distilling personas (people or rule systems) into self-contained Claude Code skills. 5 skills (distill-meta, persona-judge, distill-collector, persona-router, persona-debate), 9 persona schemas, 19 reusable components (incl. execution-profile via Klein-RPD/CDM 4-sweep), 8-phase pipeline with CDM-based execution layer extraction.
